fields.name: id
fields.notes: Canonical plan id — starter|market|business|enterprise (lowercase). Server is sole authority; unknown/absent fails CLOSED to starter (S-3). In this screen the catalog is INLINE as static const _tiers (subscription_screens.dart lines ~422-480) keyed by display name, NOT id; the canonical id-bearing source is billing.dart kPlans (lines ~151-195) / kPlanIds.

fields.name: name
fields.notes: Display name (Starter/Market/Business/Enterprise). billing.dart Plan.name; _tiers tuple[0]. planDisplayName() maps id->name.

fields.name: pricePerMonth
fields.notes: Store price. billing.dart Plan.pricePerMonth (naira: starter 0, market 2500, business 6000, enterprise -1 sentinel = off-store 'from ₦18,000' talk-to-sales). Per Money convention (S-1) backend should express money as integer kobo on the wire. _tiers renders price as a pre-formatted string tuple[1] ('Free'/'₦2,500/mo'/'₦6,000/mo'/'from ₦18,000/mo').

fields.name: tagline
fields.notes: Who-it's-for line. billing.dart Plan.tagline; _tiers tuple[2] (who): 'Just getting started'/'Market traders & shops'/'Growing businesses'/'Distributors & chains'.

fields.name: features
fields.notes: Human-readable feature bullet list rendered per card. billing.dart Plan.features; _tiers tuple[6] (rows), e.g. ['10 automatic reminders / month','Solo — no staff seats','10 AI credits / month','Scale up to ₦2M'].

fields.name: productId
fields.notes: Store IAP auto-renewable subscription product id (oweme_market_monthly / oweme_business_monthly). billing.dart Plan.productId. Null for starter (free) and enterprise (off-store). Not rendered by this screen but part of the canonical Plan shape.

fields.name: talkToSales
fields.notes: Enterprise = off-store B2B invoice, never an IAP product. billing.dart Plan.talkToSales; _tiers tuple[5] (sales), true only for Enterprise.

fields.name: recommended
fields.notes: UI highlight flag — Business card is styled 'Recommended' (green chip + primary border). _tiers tuple[4] (recommended), true only for Business. Presentation-only; no billing.dart counterpart.

fields.name: sendsPerMonth
fields.notes: Metered automated-send allowance (SMS/WhatsApp) per month. billing.dart PlanLimits.sendsPerMonth / kPlanLimits (starter 10, market 50, business 150, enterprise -1 = fair-use). Surfaced in _tiers feature bullets ('N message sends / month').

fields.name: aiCreditsPerMonth
fields.notes: AI credit allowance per month (shared weighted ledger). billing.dart PlanLimits.aiCreditsPerMonth (starter 10, market 100, business 500, enterprise -1 = fair-use). Surfaced in _tiers bullets ('N AI credits / month').

fields.name: staffSeats
fields.notes: Included staff seats. billing.dart PlanLimits.staffSeats (starter 0, market 1, business 5, enterprise -1 = unlimited). Surfaced in _tiers bullets ('Solo — no staff seats' / 'N staff seat(s)').

fields.name: bvumCeiling
fields.notes: Business Value Under Management ceiling in naira; null = unlimited (enterprise). billing.dart PlanLimits.bvumCeiling (starter 2000000, market 2000000, business 20000000, enterprise null). Surfaced in _tiers bullets ('Scale up to ₦2M/₦20M' / 'Unlimited scale').

sourceProvenance.canonical: lib/data/billing/billing.dart — Plan class (~128-149), kPlans catalog (~151-195), PlanLimits class (~64-79) + kPlanLimits (~81-106), kPlanIds/canonicalPlanId/planDisplayName (~42-55), limitsFor (~108).
sourceProvenance.inlineDuplicate: lib/screens/settings/subscription_screens.dart — ComparePlansScreen.static const _tiers, lines ~422-480. Four positional tuples (name, price, who, popularUnusedBool, recommendedBool, talkToSalesBool, features[]) destructured in _TierCard at ~579. This duplicates kPlans; treat billing.dart as authoritative. -1 sentinels (fair-use/unlimited) appear as '-1' in kPlanLimits and as prose ('Fair-use…','Unlimited…') in _tiers.
sourceProvenance.serverAuthoritative: Per conventions.md, plan catalog + entitlements are SERVER-AUTHORITATIVE; client Plan/limits are display-only mirrors. Backend must own this catalog (a Plan reference resource) rather than trust the inline literal.

authContext.notes: Subscription/billing surface — owner-only per conventions (staff cannot touch billing/subscription). Nested under /settings/subscription.

currentPlanHighlight.source: repo.watchBusiness() -> BusinessProfile?; screen reads biz.data?.plan (defaulting to 'Market' when null) at ~494 and marks the matching tier 'Current' by case-insensitive name match (~580). Also gates the 'Upgrade to Business' CTA off onBusiness = plan=='business' (~495,519). This is derived UI state, not a separate read entity; backend supplies the business's current plan via the Business resource.

uiStatesNotes: Catalog is a static const literal, so it always renders (no loading/empty/error branches). The only stream is repo.watchBusiness for the current-plan highlight, which falls back to 'Market' on null (no explicit loading/error UI).
